/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/transcoder.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o transcoder   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1/lib -lavformat -lavcodec -lswresample -lswscale -lavutil
